name: Article Writer
description: AI-powered WordPress content studio: keyword research, SE Rankings tracking, AI article writing with SEO optimization, and one-click publishing to WordPress.

tools.name: article_writer
tools.description: Article Writer — SEO and blog content tool. ALWAYS use for: Google search positions/rankings (покажи позиции в Google, какие позиции сайта, SEO rankings, где ранжируется), keyword research (найди ключевые слова), content plan (придумай контент план для блога), write/rewrite articles (напиши статью, перепиши вступление), WordPress: publish, draft, show posts, SEO settings, Rank Math, SE Ranking tracking (добавь кейворд в трекинг).

tools.name: skeleton_refresh_current_article
tools.description: Currently open article in editor — keyword, title, word count, status, article_id

tools.name: skeleton_refresh_content_overview
tools.description: Content plan totals: ideas, writing, review, published counts

tools.name: skeleton_refresh_wp_config
tools.description: WordPress + SE Ranking connection status and domain

tools.name: go_plan
tools.description: Switch main panel to Content Plan view.

tools.name: go_plan_ideas
tools.description: Switch to Content Plan showing only Idea status items.

tools.name: go_plan_writing
tools.description: Switch to Content Plan showing only Writing status items.

tools.name: go_plan_review
tools.description: Switch to Content Plan showing only Review status items.

tools.name: go_plan_done
tools.description: Switch to Content Plan showing only Published/Done items.

tools.name: go_rankings
tools.description: Switch main panel to Rankings view.

tools.name: go_keywords
tools.description: Switch main panel to Keyword Research view.

tools.name: go_settings
tools.description: Switch main panel to Settings view.

tools.name: go_docs
tools.description: Switch main panel to Knowledge Base (docs) view.

tools.name: open_editor
tools.description: Open a specific content item in the editor.

content_id.description: Content item ID to open in editor
content_id.title: Content Id

tools.name: set_editor_mode
tools.description: Toggle editor between edit and preview mode.

tools.name: go_preview
tools.description: Switch editor to preview mode.

tools.name: go_edit
tools.description: Switch editor to edit mode.

tools.name: show_editor_panel
tools.description: Show the article text editor in Step 3.

tools.name: hide_editor_panel
tools.description: Hide the article text editor in Step 3.

tools.name: resume_editor
tools.description: Return to the editor for the currently open content item.

tools.name: new_content
tools.description: Create a new content plan item (blog post or newsletter) and open it in the editor.

volume.description: Monthly search volume from SE Ranking
volume.title: Volume

tools.name: import_from_wp
tools.description: Import a WordPress post and optionally edit it in one step. Use when user mentions editing/rewriting a specific WordPress post. If instruction is provided (rewrite intro, add section, etc.), applies the edit immediately after import — NO second tool call needed. Use for: перепиши вступление поста 1902, edit WP post 1902, import and rewrite, import and improve, измени статью из WP. post_id: WP post ID. instruction: what to change (optional).

keyword_hint.description: Post title or keyword to search for in WordPress
keyword_hint.title: Keyword Hint

instruction.description: If provided, immediately edit the post after importing (e.g. rewrite intro, add section)
instruction.title: Instruction

tools.name: save_draft
tools.description: Save title and HTML content from the editor to the content store.

content_id.description: Content item ID — leave empty to use currently open item
content_id.title: Content Id

tools.name: update_status
tools.description: Move a content item to a new status: idea, writing, review, or published.

content_id.description: Content item ID — leave empty to use currently open item
content_id.title: Content Id

tools.name: delete_content
tools.description: Delete a content plan item permanently.

content_id.description: Content item ID to delete
content_id.title: Content Id

tools.name: generate_brief
tools.description: Generate an SEO content brief: title, meta description, H2/H3 outline, search intent. Saved and shown in the editor.

content_id.description: Content item ID — leave empty to use currently open item
content_id.title: Content Id

extra.description: Additional context or instructions for the AI
extra.title: Extra

tools.name: save_brief
tools.description: Save manually edited brief text.

content_id.description: Content item ID — leave empty to use currently open item
content_id.title: Content Id

tools.name: patch_article
tools.description: Edit or rewrite a specific part of an article. CALL THIS DIRECTLY — do NOT navigate to content plan first. Use keyword_hint to find the article by name if none is open. Use when user says: rewrite intro/paragraph/conclusion, fix this section, make it more engaging, перепиши абзац/вступление/заключение, сделай цепляющим, улучши начало, измени этот раздел, перепиши статью про X, add a section about X. keyword_hint: article name/keyword (e.g. 'infinityfree', 'affordable hosting'). Can work without an open article — just provide keyword_hint.

content_id.description: Content item ID — leave empty to use currently open item
content_id.title: Content Id

keyword_hint.description: Keyword or title to find the article if no content_id or open article
keyword_hint.title: Keyword Hint

tools.name: check_article_quality
tools.description: Script-based article quality audit — zero AI tokens. Checks: word count, H2/H3 structure, comparison table, FAQ, outbound links, keyword density, em dashes, placeholders, bold text, lists. Returns score 0-100 and specific issues to fix.

content_id.description: Content item ID — leave empty to use currently open item
content_id.title: Content Id

extra.description: Additional context or instructions for the AI
extra.title: Extra

tools.name: list_articles
tools.description: List all content items in the content plan (articles, newsletters). Use when user asks: show my articles, what articles do I have, list content, show drafts, what have I written, articles from another device.

tools.name: migrate_from_store
tools.description: Migrate content items from old ctx.store to MOS server storage. One-time migration — use if articles are missing after storage upgrade.

tools.name: upload_doc
tools.description: Upload a documentation file (.md or .txt) to the knowledge base. Used as AI context when writing content.

tools.name: delete_doc
tools.description: Delete a documentation file from the knowledge base.

doc_id.description: Store ID of the doc to delete
doc_id.title: Doc Id

tools.name: list_docs
tools.description: List all uploaded documentation files in the knowledge base.

tools.name: ai_write
tools.description: Generate a full SEO + AI-optimized article. Phase 1: enrich keyword set (secondary KWs, LSI, FAQ questions). Phase 2: write via MOS content engine with structured output. section: full | improve

content_id.description: Content item ID — leave empty to use currently open item
content_id.title: Content Id

article_type.description: blog | comparison | tutorial | pillar | news | review — overrides item type
article_type.title: Article Type

tools.name: check_article_job
tools.description: Check if background article generation has completed. Call after ai_write to retrieve the finished article. Returns 'pending' if still generating, saves and shows article when done.

content_id.description: Content item ID — leave empty to use currently open item
content_id.title: Content Id

extra.description: Additional context or instructions for the AI
extra.title: Extra

tools.name: improve_article
tools.description: Fully improve/rewrite the current article for SEO and quality. Use when user says: improve article, make it better, full rewrite, улучши статью, перепиши полностью, сделай лучше, SEO улучшение, добавь FAQ, оптимизируй под SEO. Adds FAQ, sharpens structure, improves keyword density. Async — ~60s.

content_id.description: Content item ID — leave empty to use currently open item
content_id.title: Content Id

tools.name: generate_newsletter
tools.description: Write a newsletter from a news item or topic. Uses brand voice from Settings.

content_id.description: Newsletter content item ID — leave empty to use currently open item
content_id.title: Content Id

news_text.description: The news, update, or topic to write the newsletter about
news_text.title: News Text

tone_note.description: Optional tone instruction, e.g. 'more urgent', 'focus on price'
tone_note.title: Tone Note

tools.name: fetch_keywords
tools.description: Find keywords using SE Ranking — keyword research, volume, difficulty, positions. Use when user asks: find keywords, what keywords to target, keyword ideas for topic X, show me keywords for [topic], поиск ключевых слов, найди ключевые слова, какие ключевики взять, keywords for [topic/niche]. Uses configured domain by default. All params optional.

domain.description: Domain to analyse — leave empty to use domain from Settings
domain.title: Domain

source.description: Regional database code, e.g. 'us', 'gb' — empty = use Settings
source.title: Source

tools.name: fetch_gaps
tools.description: Find keyword gaps vs competitor — keywords competitor ranks for but we don't. Use when user asks: what keywords am I missing, gap analysis, competitor keywords, что я упускаю по ключевым словам, анализ конкурентов, keyword gaps.

limit.description: Number of gap keywords to return
limit.title: Limit

tools.name: fetch_rankings
tools.description: Show ORGANIC Google search positions from SE Ranking — NOT Microsoft Ads, NOT paid advertising. Use for SEO keyword ranking positions only. покажи мои позиции, позиции в Google, SEO позиции, мои позиции в поиске, покажи SEO Rankings, на каком месте сайт в Google, keyword rankings, органические позиции.

tools.name: list_ser_projects
tools.description: List SE Ranking projects — use this to find the project_id for settings.

tools.name: build_content_plan
tools.description: Generate a 5-article content plan using SE Ranking keyword data and AI. Automatically avoids topics already published on the blog. Creates content items in the plan ready for writing.

competitor.description: Competitor domain for gap analysis — empty = use Settings
competitor.title: Competitor

tools.name: setup_blog_style
tools.description: Analyze a blog URL and create a writing style profile for that blog. Use when user provides their blog URL and wants articles written in their style. Crawls RSS feed, analyzes recent posts, generates writing instructions.

tools.name: publish_wp
tools.description: Create or update a WordPress post from a blog content item. status: 'draft' or 'publish'.

content_id.description: Content item ID — leave empty to use currently open item
content_id.title: Content Id

keyword_hint.description: Keyword or title of the article — server resolves ID automatically
keyword_hint.title: Keyword Hint

tools.name: publish_wp_draft
tools.description: Publish or update the current WordPress post as a draft.

content_id.description: Content item ID — leave empty to use currently open item
content_id.title: Content Id

keyword_hint.description: Keyword or title of the article — server resolves ID automatically
keyword_hint.title: Keyword Hint

tools.name: publish_wp_publish
tools.description: Publish or update the current WordPress post as published (live).

content_id.description: Content item ID — leave empty to use currently open item
content_id.title: Content Id

keyword_hint.description: Keyword or title of the article — server resolves ID automatically
keyword_hint.title: Keyword Hint

tools.name: set_wp_seo
tools.description: Set Rank Math SEO on the WordPress post: focus + secondary keywords, meta description, excerpt. Auto-generates meta description and excerpt if not provided. Call after publish_wp.

content_id.description: Content item ID — leave empty to use currently open item
content_id.title: Content Id

keyword_hint.description: Keyword or title of the article to update — server resolves ID automatically
keyword_hint.title: Keyword Hint

meta_description.description: SEO meta description (120-155 chars) — leave empty to auto-generate
meta_description.title: Meta Description

focus_keyword.description: Rank Math focus keyword — leave empty to use item's keyword
focus_keyword.title: Focus Keyword

tools.name: save_settings
tools.description: Save API keys and configuration for SE Ranking and WordPress.

tools.name: get_settings
tools.description: Show Article Writer extension settings — SE Ranking and WordPress API keys (masked). Use ONLY for: SE Ranking keys configured, WordPress credentials check, какие ключи SE Ranking настроены, есть ли ключ SE Ranking, Article Writer настройки, seranking_api_key, wp_app_password configured. NOT for Matomo/analytics stats — only API key presence check.

tools.name: list_wp_posts
tools.description: List posts from WordPress — published AND drafts. Use when user asks: show WP posts, show drafts, what's in WordPress, show published articles, list blog drafts. Shows title, status, date, URL. Use status='draft' for only drafts, 'publish' for published, leave empty for all.

tools.name: unpublish_wp
tools.description: Set a WordPress post back to draft (unpublish). Use when user says: unpublish, снять с публикации, перевести в черновик, скрыть статью, убрать с сайта, set to draft.

content_id.description: Content item ID — leave empty to use currently open item
content_id.title: Content Id

keyword_hint.description: Post title/keyword to find if no content_id
keyword_hint.title: Keyword Hint

tools.name: get_article_link
tools.description: Find the URL of a specific article on OUR WordPress blog — NOT a Google search. Use for internal blog post lookups: 'найди ссылку на статью', 'где статья про X', 'дай ссылку на пост', 'url статьи X', 'можешь найти где статья', 'link to our article about X', 'permalink нашей статьи'. Searches WordPress drafts and published posts directly. Do NOT use Google or web search — use this tool instead.

title_or_keyword.description: Title or keyword to search for in WordPress posts
title_or_keyword.title: Title Or Keyword

tools.name: rewrite_article
tools.description: Fully rewrite the current article from scratch with improved structure and quality. Use when user says: rewrite completely, полностью перепиши, перепиши статью заново, новая версия статьи, full rewrite, rewrite from scratch. Different from improve_article (which adds sections) — this regenerates the whole article.

content_id.description: Content item ID — leave empty to use currently open item
content_id.title: Content Id

instruction.description: Optional focus for the rewrite (e.g. "more conversational tone", "comparison style")
instruction.title: Instruction

tools.name: add_keywords_to_article
tools.description: Add keywords to the current article and update Rank Math SEO. Use when user says: add keywords, добавь ключевые слова, добавь кейворды, add these keywords to the article, track these keywords in Rank Math, добавь в Rank Math.

keywords.description: Comma-separated keywords to add to the article and Rank Math
keywords.title: Keywords

content_id.description: Content item ID — leave empty to use currently open item
content_id.title: Content Id

tools.name: check_seo_meta
tools.description: Show SEO settings for an article — Rank Math focus keyword, secondary keywords, meta description, keyword density, word count, WP status. Use when user asks about SEO of an article — 'покажи rank math', 'seo настройки статьи', 'как настроено seo', 'keyword density', 'какой focus keyword', 'meta description статьи', 'check seo', 'seo audit article', 'посмотреть настройки статьи'. Works with content plan ID or WP post ID (numeric).

content_id.description: Content item ID — leave empty to use currently open item
content_id.title: Content Id

keyword_hint.description: Post title/keyword to find if no content_id
keyword_hint.title: Keyword Hint

tools.name: patch_wp_article
tools.description: Edit/rewrite a specific part of a WordPress post by WP post ID. Use when user says: rewrite intro of post 1902, edit article wp 1902, перепиши вступление поста 1902, измени статью WP #1902, edit WP article, rewrite part of published post. Fetches content directly from WordPress, patches, saves back. No need to open article in editor first.

instruction.description: What to change: rewrite intro, add section, fix conclusion, etc.
instruction.title: Instruction

tools.name: edit_wp_article
tools.description: Import a WordPress post and immediately edit/rewrite a part of it — all in one step. PREFER this over patch_article when user mentions a WordPress post ID or title. Use when user says: перепиши вступление поста 1902, edit post 1902, измени статью wp 1902, rewrite intro of WP article, перепиши вступление/абзац/заключение поста, edit/improve specific WP post. wp_post_id: numeric WordPress ID (e.g. '1902'). instruction: what to change (e.g. 'rewrite intro mentioning WebHostMost as alternative').

instruction.description: What to change: rewrite intro, add section, etc.
instruction.title: Instruction

tools.name: delete_wp_post
tools.description: Permanently delete a WordPress post (moves to trash). Use when user says: удали пост, удали черновик, delete this draft, delete WP post ID X, убери статью из WordPress, удали этот черновик навсегда. wp_post_id: WordPress numeric post ID.

wp_post_id.description: WordPress post ID to permanently delete
wp_post_id.title: Wp Post Id

keyword_hint.description: Post title/keyword to confirm which post
keyword_hint.title: Keyword Hint

tools.name: add_tracked_keyword
tools.description: Add a keyword to SE Ranking position tracking. Use when user wants to track a new keyword — 'добавь в трекинг', 'начать отслеживать кейворд', 'track this keyword', 'хочу отслеживать позицию по слову X', 'add to SE Ranking', 'мониторить позицию', 'add keyword tracking for X'.

keyword.description: Keyword to start tracking in SE Ranking
keyword.title: Keyword

landing_url.description: Landing page URL for this keyword (optional)
landing_url.title: Landing Url

tools.name: remove_tracked_keyword
tools.description: Remove a keyword from SE Ranking position tracking. Use when user says: stop tracking keyword, remove keyword from SE Ranking, удали кейворд из трекинга, убери ключевое слово из SE Ranking, перестань отслеживать X.

keyword_id.description: SE Ranking keyword ID to remove (from list_tracked_keywords)
keyword_id.title: Keyword Id

keyword.description: Keyword name to remove — system will find ID automatically
keyword.title: Keyword

tools.name: list_tracked_keywords
tools.description: List all keywords tracked in SE Ranking with IDs and positions. Use when user wants to see tracked keywords — 'какие ключевые слова я отслеживаю', 'список трекинга', 'сколько кейвордов в трекинге', 'show tracked keywords', 'what am I tracking in SE Ranking', 'покажи все мои ключевые слова'.
